# Test.ForceNoIconv.txt 知识梳理

> 来源: `Test.ForceNoIconv.txt` | 字数: 197

## 内容全文

Test.ForceNoIconv

TYPE: bool

DEFAULT: false

--DESCRIPTION--

When set to true, HTMLPurifier_Encoder will act as if iconv does not exist

and use only pure PHP implementations.
